acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: pinned TigerBeetle image digest was verified, TigerBeetle became healthy on clean and retained volumes, validation-created containers and volumes were removed, and staged whitespace checks passed

residualRisks: Full API startup, authenticated live status/retry checks, and Docker API-log token scan remain unrun because no approved first-party API image digest was available; the launcher enforces a required exact 0.1.0 tag+digest API image pin instead of guessing one.

submission.summary: Create the locked-down Tauri 2 and SolidJS desktop foundation with exact pinned manifests and lockfiles, static runtime and smoke seams, explicit app-command permissions, local-only CSP, single-instance and window-state plugins, Windows x64 gate, and VII icon assets.

acceptanceEvidence.command: rustup run 1.96.0 cargo fmt --check; rustup run 1.96.0 cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings; rustup run 1.96.0 cargo test --all-targets
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: Rust 1.96.0 formatting, clippy with denied warnings, unit tests, and integration tests passed with explicit app-command permissions and Windows x64 smoke gate

acceptanceEvidence.command: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run typecheck; bun run lint; bun run format-check; bun run test; bun run build
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: Bun 1.3.14 frozen install and all declared frontend checks passed; Vite and Vitest scripts use bun --bun so they do not depend on the host Node version

acceptanceEvidence.command: Pinned manifest searches, capability/CSP inventory, git diff --cached --check, and local browser preview at http://127.0.0.1:1420
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: direct dependencies use exact frozen pins; capability grants only core:default plus allow-get-runtime-snapshot and allow-open-logs; CSP is local-only with Tauri IPC origins; generated folders were not staged; browser preview rendered Voyage VII launching with no console errors

residualRisks: The visual preview is intentionally a bare foundation shell; full runtime supervision, runtime staging, and system-status UI remain assigned to later desktop tasks.

submission.summary: Implement the Tauri API process supervisor with managed packaged launch arguments, bounded stdout handshake parsing, token custody, credential-free runtime-change events, restart budget enforcement, shutdown escalation, Windows Job Object containment, no-descendant verification, and fake API coverage for handshake, restart, shutdown, exit-7, and process-tree scenarios.

acceptanceEvidence.command: rustup run 1.96.0 cargo fmt --check
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS

acceptanceEvidence.command: rustup run 1.96.0 cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS

acceptanceEvidence.command: rustup run 1.96.0 cargo test --all-targets
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: 14 runtime tests plus the existing desktop integration test passed, covering valid, delayed, malformed, duplicate, missing, crash, grandchild, exit-7, forced shutdown, env stripping, token redaction, restart budget, and supervisor-token shutdown scenarios

acceptanceEvidence.command: git diff --cached --check; git diff --check
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS

residualRisks: Full packaged-runtime smoke with the real API and TigerBeetle bundle remains assigned to later package and hardening tasks.

submission.summary: Implemented the static SolidJS system-status module, typed runtime/API bridges, SQLite and TigerBeetle status cards, retry actions, sanitized diagnostics, runtime-event refresh handling, polling cleanup, and focused UI/accessibility tests.

acceptanceEvidence.command: bun run typecheck; bun run lint; bun run format-check; bunx prettier "tests/ui/**/*.{ts,tsx}" --check
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: UI behavior, accessibility, keyboard, polling, generation, 401, retry, and mutation non-replay tests
acceptanceEvidence.command: bun run test
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: 2 test files, 11 tests

acceptanceEvidence.command: bun run build; rg -n "app-token|supervisorToken|Authorization: Bearer|sqlite-path|tigerbeetle-address|appToken|postgresql|postgres" apps/desktop/dist
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: build succeeded; scan found only expected frontend auth-header, appToken property, and redaction-pattern strings, with no embedded secret values or direct database access strings

acceptanceEvidence.command: git diff --check; browser screenshot capture
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: diff check reported only CRLF warnings; light-theme status screenshot staged at apps/desktop/tests/ui/evidence/desktop-003-status-light.png

residualRisks: Only the light-theme browser screenshot is staged; the embedded browser inspection surface was read-only and did not permit forcing a dark color scheme for screenshot capture.
The axe accessibility test disables color-contrast checks because jsdom lacks canvas support; WCAG color confidence depends on CSS review and system color choices.

submission.summary: Implement verified Windows x64 runtime staging with pinned official SQLite and TigerBeetle inputs, hash-addressed caching, offline replay, safe ZIP extraction, PE architecture validation, generated manifest inputs, third-party notices, ignored generated outputs, and fixture-based safety tests.

acceptanceEvidence.command: tests/runtime-staging/run-tests.ps1
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: warm-cache and offline staging, offline cache miss, corrupt archive, traversal file and directory entries, absolute archive path, duplicate ZIP entry, symlink, missing file, duplicate destination, destination escape, wrong architecture, wrong target, unsafe production output root, and alternate production source manifest cases all behaved as expected

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Official runtime staging and offline replay
acceptanceEvidence.command: tools/runtime-staging/stage-runtime.ps1; tools/runtime-staging/stage-runtime.ps1 -Offline
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: staged 7 Windows x64 runtime files totaling 33,300,015 bytes from verified cached official inputs and regenerated reports at tools/runtime-staging/reports/last-run.json and last-run.md

residualRisks: The staging scripts require PowerShell 7 or newer, declared with #requires -Version 7.0.
